short_description: S3 bucket for application backup storage
description:
Need S3 bucket for automated application backups.

Requirements:
- Bucket name: app-backups-web-services-prod
- Environment: Production
- Access: Backup service account only
- Versioning: Enabled
- Encryption: AWS KMS with company key
- Lifecycle: Transition to IA after 30 days, Glacier after 90 days, delete after 2 years
- Public access: Blocked
- Cross-region replication: Yes, to us-west-2
- Expected volume: 100GB/day
- Retention policy: 2 years for compliance
